## Summary
- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Security hardening

## Validation
- [ ] `dotnet build SteamFleet.slnx`
- [ ] `dotnet test SteamFleet.slnx`
- [ ] Docker smoke tested (if relevant)

## Security & data safety
- [ ] No credentials/tokens/session payloads committed
- [ ] Logs/screenshots sanitized
- [ ] RBAC/rate-limit impact considered

## Docs
- [ ] README/docs updated when behavior or API changed

## Screenshots / API examples (optional)
